$comment: Default-deny egress template, consumed by redteam.runtime.render_netpolicy and loaded with `nft -f -` by the container entrypoint. always_allow + from_engagement form the allow-list; deny_egress endpoints are dropped before any accept. The cloud metadata endpoint (169.254.169.254 / fd00:ec2::254) is deliberately denied: the agent's tools must never reach IMDS, or an SSRF/redirect could exfiltrate the harness's workload-role credentials. boto3/KMS obtain credentials via the workload role on a path the agent's HTTP tools cannot use (e.g. a separate network namespace or a credential sidecar); if IMDS access is unavoidable, require IMDSv2 with hop-limit 1.
$deny_log_note: Dropped packets are logged to the kernel ring buffer (journald) with the nft prefix 'redteam-egress-drop '; there is no separate netpolicy.log file in v1.
